results.rendered_html:
śallakī
1 A porcupine.
2 A kind of tree (of which elephants are very fond); abhileḍhu tāvadāsavasurabhirasaṃ śallakībhaṃgaṃ  V. 4. 23 ;  U. 2. 21 ; 3. 6 ;  Māl. 9. 6. 
Comp.
— dravaḥ incense.
